basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support -III Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Jodhpur (AIIMS Jodhpur)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Jodhpur (AIIMS Jodhpur) Project Technical Support-III Notification 2026 has been released on 02 June 2026 on the official website aiimsjodhpur.edu.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support-III Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: BSc Nursing/ BSc Microbiology + 5 year experience in the relevant field, M.Sc. Nursing or M.Sc. Microbiology or Masters in Public Health with experience in Virology
qualification.details: BSc Nursing/ BSc Microbiology + 5 year experience in the relevant field. OR M.Sc. Nursing or M.Sc. Microbiology or Masters in Public Health with experience in Virology. Desirable: Proficient in basic computer operations. Knowledge of Microsoft Office. Comfortable with handling and learning software. Proficient in regional languages spoken in the area of recruitment.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support -III posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Technical Support -III posts at AIIMS Jodhpur is scheduled for 15th June 2026. Candidates should ensure they report on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Technical Support -III position?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a BSc Nursing or BSc Microbiology with 5 years of relevant experience, or an M.Sc. Nursing, M.Sc. Microbiology, or Masters in Public Health with experience in Virology.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Technical Support -III recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Project Technical Support -III position is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support -III role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Project Technical Support -III post will receive a salary of Rs. 28,000 per month, plus HRA.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Technical Support -III post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Project Technical Support -III position at AIIMS Jodhpur.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Technical Support -III posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Examination followed by a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry original documents and self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. Is there any relaxation in the age limit?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for any such provisions.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the AIIMS Jodhpur office. The exact address and reporting time will be available in the official notification.
